problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis may resolve What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
